scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.deploy:prod:migrate: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file deploy/.env.prod exec -T mysql bash /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/07_run_migrations.sh
scripts.deploy:local:migrate: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml exec -T mysql bash /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/07_run_migrations.sh
scripts.start:prod: npm run build -w web && set SERVE_WEB=1&& npm run start -w server
scripts.dist:win: npm run build -w web && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
